claims.claim: The unaccent extension does NOT strip Hebrew nikud (U+0591-U+05C7); its default rules cover only Latin/Greek combining marks (U+0300-U+0362). Strip Hebrew nikud with regexp_replace over the Hebrew points range in an IMMUTABLE function.
claims.raw_snippet: unaccent is a text search dictionary that removes accents (diacritic signs) from lexemes. The rules it uses are defined in the unaccent.rules file, which by default covers Latin and Greek diacritics.

claims.claim: A non-deterministic ICU collation ignores differences below a chosen strength: at reduced strength (u-ks-level1) it equalizes BOTH nikud AND sofit (final) letter forms; at default strength nikud is significant so pointed/unpointed text is NOT equal. There is no strength that ignores nikud but keeps sofit distinct, so nikud-insensitivity is done with strip_nikud(), not the collation. Non-deterministic collations cannot back a UNIQUE constraint, a plain btree index, or LIKE pattern matching.
claims.raw_snippet: Nondeterministic collations ... can be used to e.g. match characters with and without accents [at a reduced strength]. A nondeterministic collation cannot be used as the collation of a column that is part of a primary key or unique constraint backed by a regular btree index, and pattern matching operators do not support nondeterministic collations.

claims.claim: ICU custom collations (he-IL-x-icu, deterministic vs non-deterministic) are configured per the PostgreSQL ICU collation docs.
claims.raw_snippet: ICU allows collations to be customized ... using the BCP 47 language tag syntax.

claims.claim: pg_trgm provides trigram similarity (% operator) and GIN/GiST indexes for fuzzy/typo-tolerant Hebrew search.
claims.raw_snippet: The pg_trgm module provides functions and operators for determining the similarity of alphanumeric text based on trigram matching.

claims.claim: Supabase uses PostgreSQL Row Level Security for per-tenant/per-user data access.
claims.raw_snippet: Row Level Security (RLS) lets you control which rows in a table a user can access.

claims.claim: Israeli VAT (Ma'am) is 18%, raised from 17% on 2025-01-01. A proposed 2026 rise to 19% was rejected; 18% stands.
claims.raw_snippet: Israel's standard VAT rate increased from 17% to 18% effective 1 January 2025.

claims.claim: The Bank of Israel publishes representative foreign-exchange rates (business days only).
claims.raw_snippet: The Bank of Israel publishes representative exchange rates of the shekel against foreign currencies.

claims.claim: Supabase Edge Functions (Deno) import the Supabase JS client from esm.sh and the HTTP server from deno.land/std in examples.
claims.raw_snippet: esm.sh serves @supabase/supabase-js v2 as an ES module for Deno/Edge runtimes.

claims.claim: Deno std http server import used in the Supabase Edge Function example.
claims.raw_snippet: deno.land/std/http/server.ts provides the serve() HTTP server for Deno.
